title: Trading App with Daily Market Updates and AI Assistant

requirements.text: Create a backend actor that stores and manages user watchlist assets, portfolio positions (entry price, quantity, stop-loss, take-profit), and daily market briefing data. Expose CRUD operations for watchlist items and portfolio positions, and a method to store/retrieve the latest daily market briefing content.

quotes: Daily Update: Summarize the total portfolio delta and highlight any asset nearing its stop-loss

acceptanceCriteria: Users can add, update, and remove assets from their watchlist
Users can add, update, and remove portfolio positions with entry price, quantity, stop-loss, and take-profit fields
Backend stores and returns the latest daily market briefing text
Portfolio delta is computable from stored positions

requirements.text: Build a Market Dashboard page that displays a daily morning briefing summarizing overnight moves across major markets (S&P 500, Crypto, Nasdaq-100), along with a macro events calendar panel showing upcoming events (CPI, earnings reports) and their deviation status.

quotes: Every morning at 8:00 AM, provide a Daily Market Briefing summarizing overnight moves
Earnings Report or Macro event (like CPI) deviates from expectations

acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard shows a daily briefing card with overnight move summaries for at least 3 markets
A macro events section lists upcoming events with expected vs actual deviation indicators
The briefing content is loaded from the backend
Dashboard is the default landing view of the app

requirements.text: Build a Watchlist page that displays tracked assets with simulated price data, technical indicators (RSI values), and visual alerts when an asset hits a technical trigger (e.g., RSI > 70 on a 4H timeframe). Include a sentiment badge per asset reflecting positive/neutral/negative news sentiment.

quotes: An asset hits a specific Technical Trigger (e.g., RSI > 70 on the 4H chart)
Sentiment Shift in social media or news that correlates with high volatility

acceptanceCriteria: Watchlist displays asset name, simulated current price, RSI value, and a trend direction indicator
Assets with RSI > 70 or RSI < 30 are highlighted with a visual alert badge
Each asset shows a sentiment badge (Bullish / Neutral / Bearish)
Users can add and remove assets from the watchlist
Watchlist state is persisted to the backend

requirements.text: Build a Portfolio Overview page that shows all active positions with their entry price, current simulated price, P&L, total portfolio delta, and a color-coded 'Health Score' (0–100). Highlight positions nearing their stop-loss with a warning indicator. Display a drawdown alert banner if any sector shows a simulated ≥10% drawdown with three suggested Exit or Hedge scenarios.

quotes: update me on the 'Health Score' of my active positions
highlight any asset nearing its stop-loss
If a sudden 10% drawdown occurs in any sector I'm invested in, immediately push a notification with three 'Exit' or 'Hedge' scenarios

acceptanceCriteria: Each position row displays: asset name, entry price, current price, P&L percentage, and stop-loss distance
A portfolio Health Score gauge is shown at the top of the page
Positions within 5% of their stop-loss are highlighted in amber/red
A drawdown alert banner appears when simulated sector drawdown exceeds 10%, listing three exit/hedge options
Total portfolio delta is displayed as a summary metric

requirements.text: Build an AI Trading Assistant panel accessible from all pages as a sidebar or dedicated page. The assistant operates in three selectable modes: (1) Daily Strategist — answers questions with morning briefing context and provides risk-managed trade setups with Entry, Stop-Loss, and Take-Profit levels; (2) Risk & Portfolio Guard — analyzes proposed trades against existing portfolio for correlation risk and portfolio impact; (3) Alpha Hunter — presents the top 3 daily high-probability breakout setups (Bull Flag, Double Bottom) with Entry, Stop-Loss, and Take-Profit levels. The assistant uses pre-scripted intelligent responses based on simulated market data (no external LLM API calls). Users type queries and receive formatted responses.

quotes: Act as my Senior Trading Assistant
You are my Portfolio Risk Manager
Act as a Quantitative Research Bot
All suggestions must include a clear Entry, Stop-Loss, and Take-Profit level

acceptanceCriteria: Assistant panel has three clearly labeled mode tabs: Daily Strategist, Risk & Portfolio Guard, Alpha Hunter
Users can type a query and receive a formatted response in the active mode
Daily Strategist responses include a trade setup with Entry, Stop-Loss, and Take-Profit fields
Risk & Portfolio Guard mode shows a correlation risk summary when a trade is proposed
Alpha Hunter mode surfaces 3 simulated breakout setups with full trade parameters
Assistant conversation history is displayed in a scrollable chat-style interface
Mode switching clears or contextually reframes the conversation

requirements.text: Apply a dark-themed, professional financial terminal visual design across the entire app. Use a deep charcoal/near-black background with high-contrast accent colors (e.g., electric green for gains, crimson for losses, amber for warnings). Use a monospaced or semi-monospaced typeface for numeric data and a clean sans-serif for prose. Layout should use a persistent left-side navigation bar and card-based content panels with subtle grid lines evoking a trading terminal aesthetic.
acceptanceCriteria: All pages share a consistent dark charcoal background
Gain values are displayed in green, loss values in red/crimson, warnings in amber
Numeric data uses a monospaced or semi-monospaced font
A persistent left navigation bar provides access to Dashboard, Watchlist, Portfolio, and AI Assistant sections
Cards and panels have subtle borders and grid-line styling evoking a terminal interface

requirements.text: Generate a dark trading terminal-style app logo/icon and a dashboard hero banner image.
acceptanceCriteria: App logo is displayed in the top of the left navigation bar
Hero banner is shown at the top of the Market Dashboard page
Both assets are loaded from frontend/public/assets/generated

constraints: No external API calls to real market data providers — all price and indicator data must be simulated/mocked within the frontend or backend
No external LLM or AI service integration — AI assistant responses must use pre-scripted rule-based logic
All Motoko logic must remain in a single main actor file
nonGoals: User authentication or Internet Identity integration
Actual order execution or brokerage integration
Mobile app or React Native version
Backtesting engine with real historical data

required: Dark trading terminal logo mark with a stylized upward candlestick chart and circuit-line details in electric green on a near-black background (tradeiq-logo.dim_128x128.png)
Wide dark trading terminal dashboard hero banner featuring candlestick charts, glowing green trend lines, and subtle grid overlay on a deep charcoal background (dashboard-hero.dim_1200x300.png)
